name: InternLM
description: Open-source LLM family (书生·浦语) from Shanghai AI Laboratory supporting chat, math, coding and multimodal (InternVL) workloads.

seo.title: InternLM — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: InternLM: Open-source LLM family (书生·浦语) from Shanghai AI Laboratory supporting chat, math, coding and multimodal (InternVL) workloads.

when_to_use: Running state-of-the-art Chinese open-source LLMs locally
Fine-tuning InternLM models for domain-specific tasks
Building long-context reasoning chains with 1M token support
Benchmarking InternLM2 against GPT-4 on Chinese reasoning tasks

pros: Fully open weights including multimodal InternVL
Competitive on reasoning and code benchmarks
cons: Inference infra is your problem — not hosted API
English performance lags on some tasks
Ecosystem smaller than Qwen or Llama
review.verdict: A strong open-weight Chinese LLM family for teams that want to self-host multimodal.
review.best_for: Research teams and China-based developers self-hosting open LLMs
review.not_for: Product teams wanting a managed API like OpenAI or Anthropic

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
